info.name: Project Management API
info.description:
Full API for the Project Management backend (Express 5 + better-auth + Prisma/MySQL).

Base URL variable: `{{baseUrl}}` (default http://localhost:5000). All routes are under `/api/v1`.

Auth: log in first — cookies (accessToken, refreshToken, better-auth.session_token) are httpOnly and stored in Postman's cookie jar automatically, so protected requests just work.

Folders: Auth, Workspace, Workspace Members, Projects, Project Members, Tasks, Comments, Dashboard, Notifications, Invitations. Replace `:id`/`:workspaceId`/`:projectId`/`:taskId` path segments with real ids or set the matching collection variables (many are captured automatically by the create requests).

request.description: Register a new user. Email must be verified via OTP before tokens are issued.
Verify email with the 4-digit OTP sent on registration. Returns access + refresh tokens.
Login with email and password. Sets httpOnly cookies and returns tokens.
Get the currently authenticated user's profile. Requires the accessToken + session cookies set by login.
Issue new access/refresh tokens using the refreshToken + session cookies.
Change the password for the logged-in user. Requires auth cookies.
Resend the email-verification OTP.
Resend the password-reset OTP (email must already be verified).
Send a password-reset OTP to the user's email.
Reset the password using the OTP from forget-password.
Log out the current user and clear auth cookies.
Starts the Google OAuth flow. Open this in a browser (redirect-based) — not testable purely in Postman.
Create a workspace (multipart/form-data). Owner is auto-added as an ADMIN member. `image` is optional.
Update workspace (owner or admin only). Replacing image deletes the old Cloudinary asset.
System ADMIN / SUPER_ADMIN only. Normal USER gets 403.
Workspaces the user owns OR is a member of.
Owner only.
Any workspace member can view. Path param: workspaceId.
Owner/admin only. role = ADMIN | MEMBER (default MEMBER).
Owner/admin only. Non-owner admins cannot modify another admin.
Owner/admin only. Owner cannot be removed; non-owner admin cannot remove another admin.
Creator must be a workspace member. teamLead (defaults to creator) is auto-added as LEAD project member. status/priority/progress optional.
All projects across workspaces the user is a member of.
Path param id = projectId. Requires workspace membership.
Owner/admin only. Changing teamLeadId syncs project_member (new LEAD added, old lead demoted to MEMBER). progress is NOT settable here (auto-computed from tasks).
Owner/admin only.
Owner/admin only. PHASE 6 rule: member must already be a workspace member. role = LEAD | MEMBER.
Any workspace member can view.
Owner/admin only. Team lead cannot be removed (change lead first).

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Implement Authentication",
    "description": "Create login and registration system",
    "type": "FEATURE",
    "priority": "HIGH",
    "status": "TODO",
    "assigneeId": null,
    "dueDate": "2026-07-25T00:00:00.000Z"
}

request.description: Requester must be a workspace member. assignee (if set) must be a project member. Creator is recorded. Logs a CREATED activity.
Optional filters via query params.
Includes creator, assignee, comments and last 20 activities.
Edit task fields. Reassigning notifies the new assignee and logs an activity. Send dueDate:null to clear it. Status is NOT changed here (use Update Status).
Allowed: TODO->IN_PROGRESS->IN_REVIEW->DONE, plus IN_PROGRESS->TODO and IN_REVIEW->IN_PROGRESS. Recomputes project progress + logs STATUS_CHANGED.
Assign (or send null to unassign). Assignee must be a project member. Notifies the assignee.
Task history: CREATED, ASSIGNED/UNASSIGNED, STATUS_CHANGED, PRIORITY_CHANGED, TYPE_CHANGED, TITLE_CHANGED.
Recomputes project progress after deletion.
Any workspace member can comment. Notifies the task assignee.
All comments on a task (oldest first).
Comment owner only.
Comment owner OR workspace owner/admin.
Totals: projects (total/active/completed), members, projects-by-status. Member only.
Task counts (total/completed/inProgress/inReview/pending/overdue), members, progress (auto). Member only.
My notifications + unread count. ?unread=true for unread only.
Mark all my notifications read.
Mark one notification read (owner only).
Delete one notification (owner only).
Workspace admin only. Email is normalized to lowercase. Sends an invite email.
Invitations I sent OR received (by my email).
Accepting user's email must match. Adds workspace membership + notifies inviter.
Invited user rejects a pending invitation.
Inviter or workspace admin. Accepted invitations cannot be deleted.
Server root health check.
